author: aravhawk
name: 14L Int4-Packed MLP GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112
blurb: 14 layers (first beyond 11) funded by true int4 bit-packing for MLP (2 values per byte, halving raw storage before LZMA). Full Hessian GPTQ with AR self-generated calibration, int4 for MLP (clip_range=7), int6 for attention (clip_range=31). XSA on all 14 layers, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, BigramHash(3072,112), Parallel Muon, EMA(0.997), LZMA preset=9. Built on abaybektursun SOTA (1.1147 bpb at 11L). Novel technique: pack_int4/unpack_int4 stores two 4-bit quantized weights in a single byte.
